nasb.text: But Moses searched carefully for the goat of the sin offering, and behold, it had been burned up! So he was angry with Aaron’s surviving sons Eleazar and Ithamar, saying,

esv.text: Now Moses diligently inquired about the goat of the sin offering, and behold, it was burned up! And he was angry with Eleazar and Ithamar, the surviving sons of Aaron, saying,

cnv.text: 那時，摩西急切地尋找那作贖罪祭的公山羊，發現已經燒了；他就向亞倫剩下的兒子以利亞撒和以他瑪發怒，說：

ccb.text: 摩西到处寻找那只作赎罪祭的公山羊，却发现那只羊已经被焚烧了。他愤怒地对亚伦剩下的两个儿子以利亚撒和以他玛说：
